statement.en: Environmental risk assessment for Pambukovica Dam Project in Serbia - A case study

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document is dated 2026-04-25 (future date from current knowledge cutoff), classified as preprint/working paper in arXiv-style metadata. Environmental risk assessment methodology exists and is formalizable, but this specific case study appears provisional, not yet peer-reviewed, and the future date suggests either: (a) metadata error, (b) speculative/planned assessment, or (c) document from outside training data. Cannot assign TRUE/FALSE until validation; not BOTH (no refutation evident); not NEITHER (it makes falsifiable claims about environmental risk); FLOWING best captures provisional status.
